---
title: "ledger.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\gungnir\ledger.py"
loc: 44
complexity: 4
logic_score: 8.38
style_score: 3.61
intel_score: 6.85
overall_score: 4.51
---

## Intent
The `ledger.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on LedgerManager, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via LedgerManager, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 18 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [uuid](file://uuid)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `LedgerManager`
- `execute`
